name: onResourceStart
description: Fired when a resource starts. The resourceName parameter is the name of the started resource.

name: onResourceStop
description: Fired when a resource stops. Use this to clean up entities, blips, and NUI focus.

name: onResourceStarting
description: Fired before a resource starts. Can be cancelled with CancelEvent().

name: onServerResourceStart
description: Fired on the server when any resource starts.

name: onServerResourceStop
description: Fired on the server when any resource stops.

name: onResourceListRefresh
description: Fired when the resource list is refreshed (e.g. after 'refresh' command). Server only.

name: playerConnecting
description: Fired when a player is connecting. Use deferrals to show loading messages or reject the connection.

name: playerDropped
description: Fired when a player disconnects. Source is the player who dropped.

name: playerJoining
description: Fired when a player is joining (after connecting, before fully loaded).

name: onClientMapStart
description: Fired on the client when the game map has loaded.

name: onClientMapStop
description: Fired on the client when the game map is unloading.

name: onClientGameTypeStart
description: Fired on the client when a gametype resource starts.

name: onClientGameTypeStop
description: Fired on the client when a gametype resource stops.

name: onClientResourceStart
description: Fired on the client when a resource starts.

name: onClientResourceStop
description: Fired on the client when a resource stops.

name: gameEventTriggered
description: Fired when a game event is triggered (e.g. CEventNetworkEntityDamage). Use to detect deaths, damage, etc.

name: populationPedCreating
description: Fired when the game is about to create an ambient ped. Can be cancelled to prevent ped spawning.

name: respawnPlayerPedEvent
description: Fired when a player's ped is respawned.

name: vehicleComponentControlEvent
description: Fired when a vehicle component control event occurs.

name: entityCreating
description: Fired when a networked entity is about to be created. Can be cancelled to prevent creation.

name: entityCreated
description: Fired when a networked entity has been created.

name: entityRemoved
description: Fired when a networked entity has been removed.

name: playerEnteredScope
description: Fired when a player enters the scope of another player. data contains 'for' and 'player' fields.

name: playerLeftScope
description: Fired when a player leaves the scope of another player. data contains 'for' and 'player' fields.

name: explosionEvent
description: Fired when an explosion event is received. Can be cancelled for anti-cheat purposes.

name: weaponDamageEvent
description: Fired when a weapon damage event is received from a client. Can be cancelled for anti-cheat.

name: startProjectileEvent
description: Fired when a projectile is fired. Can be cancelled. Includes weapon hash and target coords.

name: fireEvent
description: Fired when a fire is started. Can be cancelled for anti-cheat or controlled environments.

name: ptFxEvent
description: Fired when a particle effect event is triggered. Can be cancelled.

name: rconCommand
description: Fired when an RCON command is executed.

name: txAdmin:events:serverShuttingDown
description: Fired by txAdmin when the server is shutting down. Use for graceful cleanup.

name: txAdmin:events:scheduledRestart
description: Fired by txAdmin when a scheduled restart is approaching.

name: baseevents:onPlayerDied
description: Fired when the local player dies (requires baseevents resource).

name: baseevents:onPlayerKilled
description: Fired when the local player is killed by another player (requires baseevents resource).

name: baseevents:enteringVehicle
description: Fired when the player starts entering a vehicle (requires baseevents resource).

name: baseevents:enteredVehicle
description: Fired when the player finishes entering a vehicle (requires baseevents resource).

name: baseevents:leftVehicle
description: Fired when the player exits a vehicle (requires baseevents resource).

name: chatMessage
description: Fired when a chat message is sent. Can be cancelled to suppress the message.

name: chat:addMessage
description: Add a message to the chat window. message is a table with args (array of text) and optional color.

name: chat:addSuggestion
description: Add a command suggestion to the chat input. Shows autocomplete when typing the command.

name: chat:addSuggestions
description: Add multiple command suggestions at once. Each suggestion has name, help, and params fields.

name: chat:addTemplate
description: Add a custom HTML template for chat messages.

name: chat:clear
description: Clear all messages from the chat window.

name: chat:removeSuggestion
description: Remove a previously added command suggestion from the chat.

name: esx:playerLoaded
description: Fired when a player's xPlayer object is fully created and the character joins the world.

name: esx:setJob
description: Fired after any change in a player's job. Includes the new job table and the previous job table.

name: esx:setDuty
description: Fired after any change in a player's job duty state.

name: esx:setGroups
description: Fired after any change in a player's groups.

name: esx:addGroup
description: Fired after a new group is added to a player.

name: esx:removeGroup
description: Fired after a group is removed from a player.

name: esx:jobsRefreshed
description: Fired when the jobs table is refreshed via ESX.RefreshJobs().

name: esx:playerDeath
description: Fired on the server when a player dies. data contains killerServerId, distance, and death circumstances.

name: esx:onPlayerSpawn
description: Fired on the client when the player respawns after death.

name: esx:playerJumping
description: Fired on the client when the player jumps.

name: esx:setAccountMoney
description: Fired when a player's account money changes. account is the updated account table.

name: esx:addInventoryItem
description: Fired when an item is added to a player's inventory.

name: esx:removeInventoryItem
description: Fired when an item is removed from a player's inventory.

name: esx:showNotification
description: Fired on the client to display a notification. type can be 'info', 'success', 'error'.

name: esx:showHelpNotification
description: Fired on the client to display a help notification (floating text).

name: QBCore:Client:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the client when the player's data has finished loading.

name: QBCore:Client:OnPlayerUnload
description: Fired on the client when the player is unloading (disconnect/character switch).

name: QBCore:Client:OnJobUpdate
description: Fired on the client when the player's job changes. job is the new job table.

name: QBCore:Client:OnGangUpdate
description: Fired on the client when the player's gang changes. gang is the new gang table.

name: QBCore:Client:OnMoneyChange
description: Fired on the client when the player's money changes. operation is 'add' or 'remove'.

name: QBCore:Client:UpdateObject
description: Fired on the client to refresh the QBCore shared object. Listen and re-fetch with exports.

name: QBCore:Client:OnPlayerData
description: Fired on the client when player data is updated (generic catch-all for data changes).

name: QBCore:Server:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the server when a player finishes loading. source is the server ID.

name: QBCore:Server:PlayerDropped
description: Fired on the server when a QBCore player disconnects. Fires after playerDropped.

name: QBCore:Server:OnJobUpdate
description: Fired on the server when a player's job changes.

name: QBCore:Server:OnGangUpdate
description: Fired on the server when a player's gang changes.

name: QBCore:Server:OnMoneyChange
description: Fired on the server when a player's money changes.

name: QBCore:Server:SetDuty
description: Fired on the server when a player's duty status changes.

name: QBCore:Server:OnPermissionUpdate
description: Fired on the server when player permissions are updated.

name: QBCore:Server:UpdateObject
description: Fired on the server to refresh the QBCore shared object.

name: ox:playerLoaded
description: Fired when an ox_core player finishes loading their character.

name: ox:playerLogout
description: Fired when an ox_core player logs out or switches characters.

name: ox:setGroup
description: Fired when a player's group (job/gang/role) is changed.

name: ox:setActiveGroup
description: Fired when a player's active group changes (the group currently displayed/active).

name: ox:playerDeath
description: Fired when an ox_core player dies.

name: ox:statusChange
description: Fired when a player's status (hunger, thirst, stress, etc.) changes.

name: ox:setPlayerData
description: Fired when arbitrary player data is set via ox_core.

name: ox:resourceReady
description: Fired when an ox_core-dependent resource is ready to run (after ox_core init).

name: QBX:Client:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the client when the Qbox player object is fully loaded and ready.

name: QBX:Client:OnPlayerUnload
description: Fired on the client when the player is unloading (disconnect or character switch).

name: QBX:Client:OnJobUpdate
description: Fired on the client when the player's job data changes.

name: QBX:Client:OnGangUpdate
description: Fired on the client when the player's gang data changes.

name: QBX:Server:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the server when a Qbox player object is fully created and the character joins.

name: QBX:Server:OnPlayerUnload
description: Fired on the server when a player disconnects or switches character.

name: QBX:Server:OnJobUpdate
description: Fired on the server when a player's job is updated.

name: QBX:Server:OnMoneyChange
description: Fired on the server when a player's money changes.

name: QBX:Server:OnGangUpdate
description: Fired on the server when a player's gang is updated.

name: vorp:playerLoaded
description: Fired on the server when a VORP player character is fully loaded.

name: vorp:playerDropped
description: Fired on the server when a VORP player disconnects.

name: vorp:selectedCharacter
description: Fired on the server when a player selects a character from the character selection screen.

name: vorp:playerJobChange
description: Fired on the server when a player's job changes in VORP.

name: RSGCore:Client:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the client when the RSG player object is fully loaded.

name: RSGCore:Client:OnPlayerUnload
description: Fired on the client when the RSG player is unloading.

name: RSGCore:Server:OnPlayerLoaded
description: Fired on the server when an RSG player object is fully created.

name: RSGCore:Server:OnPlayerUnload
description: Fired on the server when an RSG player disconnects or switches character.

name: RSGCore:Server:OnJobUpdate
description: Fired on the server when an RSG player's job is updated.

name: RSGCore:Server:OnMoneyChange
description: Fired on the server when an RSG player's money changes.
